CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Continued To Aug-16-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DEBT MANAGEMENT PARTNERS, LLC'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Written Stipulation Of All Parties

Plaintiff's Motion for Entry of Judgment Pursuant to Stipulation of All Parties is granted.

Plaintiff's counsel is to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and is in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Suzanne Bolanos, Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/SRB)
